name: Spokeo
description: People search aggregator Tool: https://spokeo.com/. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #740 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map Spokeo output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target

parameters.name: file
